title: Strategic Goals and Objectives
content:
Strategic Goals and Objectives

Objective

1:

To strengthen the quality of education and training with technological, dynamic and sustainable approaches

Strategic Objective 1.1:

Prioritizing value and quality-oriented education that will contribute to scientific progress and cultural development by supporting the motivation of students with a new generation university approach

Strategic Objective 1.2:

Increasing the competencies of teaching staff by supporting them with innovative methods and materials

Strategic Objective 1.3:

Improving education and training processes in line with national goals and policies by ensuring their accreditation

Strategic Objective 1.4:

Transforming content and knowledge production / service to increase the quality and recognition of its programs

Strategic Objective 1.5:

Guiding the sectoral orientation of our students and graduates

Objective

2:

To strengthen R&D and interdisciplinary research activities with innovative and sustainable infrastructure

Strategic Objective 2.1:

Improving the infrastructure in research and development activities with a focus on innovative technologies and artificial intelligence

Strategic Objective 2.2:

Increasing the number of scientific research projects and publications in Q1 and Q2 journals by strengthening the research capacity of academicians

Strategic Target 2.3:

Growing the entrepreneurship ecosystem and increasing the number of patents and utility models

Strategic Objective 2.4:

Supporting the R&D potential of students by encouraging their active participation in research processes

Objective

3:

To strengthen cooperation between the University and its stakeholders

Strategic Objective 3.1:

Establishing strategic partnerships with universities, private sector, public institutions and NGOs to ensure a culture of cooperation

Strategic Objective 3.2:

Providing experience sharing and career support through the communication network established with alumni

Strategic Objective 3.3:

Increasing the public impact of university research and expertise by participating in public policy-making processes

Strategic Objective 3.4:

Contributing to local economic growth by including university resources and expertise in regional development projects

Objective

4:

Strengthen internationalization

Strategic Objective 4.1:

Developing the international experience and network of students and staff

Strategic Objective 4.2:

Creating a multicultural and international faculty and campus environment by developing a strategy to become a recognized and preferred institution in the fields of education and research on international platforms

Increasing the international quality of education and training in line with the United Nations sustainability development goals

Strategic Objective 4.4:

Improving academic and social communication and cooperation with international external stakeholders

Objective

5:

Developing quality-oriented institutional capacity

Strategic Target 5.1:

Establishment of a big data management coordinatorship within the scope of institutionalization and integration

Strategic Objective 5.2:

Creating a corporate culture and developing effective communication skills within the organization

Strategic Objective 5.3:

Improving and developing the physical structure

Strategic Objective 5.4:

Ensuring sustainability in all units of the university and disseminating the quality system

Objective

6:

To strengthen social responsibility and social contribution

Expanding scientific and cultural activities and social responsibility activities to support social development

Strategic Target 6.2:

Increasing distance and continuing education activities within the scope of lifelong learning principle

Strategic Objective 6.3:

Efficient use of energy resources and raising environmental awareness

To develop social responsibility activities to support social awareness within the scope of the Republic of Turkiye. Developing social responsibility activities to support social awareness within the scope of the Twelfth Development Plan (2024-2028) with a new generation university approach
